breadcrumb.title: The right product with guided support.
breadcrumb.desc: Our service areas are built around speed, trust and technical guidance throughout the supply process.

intro.title: We deliver solutions in four core areas.
intro.desc: In every service line, the priority is accurate product selection, process follow-up and guidance tailored to your needs.

cards.title: Spare Parts
cards.desc: Reliable sourcing and accurate part matching for Peugeot and Citroen spare parts.

cards.title: Automotive Paints
cards.desc: Professional paint support with Axalta-based solutions and Standox / Duxone product lines.
list: Guidance aligned with the application process

cards.title: Industrial Paints
cards.desc: Supported product groups for industrial, acrylic, epoxy and other use scenarios.

cards.title: Maintenance Products
cards.desc: Professional product groups for vehicle care, surface protection and application support.
list: Wide range of care and cleaning products

support.title: Planning and process management
support.text: We improve efficiency by defining the right product, planning the supply flow and providing timely guidance.

support.title: Support and consulting
support.text: We provide a communication-focused support structure for product use, application methods and technical requirements.
